ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "iso3" TEXT /* Three-letter ISO code for the country */,
  "name" TEXT /* Common name of the country */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Official name of the country */,
  "numcode" INTEGER /* Numeric code for the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent the country belongs to */,
  "enabled" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the country is enabled for business operations */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the country's capital or a central point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the country's capital or a central point */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO currency code of the country */,
  "calling_code" TEXT /* International calling code of the country */,
  "flag_url" TEXT /* URL to the country's flag image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the country was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the country's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "continents" (
  "continent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each continent */,
  "continent_name" TEXT /* Name of the continent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the continent was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the continent's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("continent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the region belongs to */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region's central point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region's central point */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the region */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_translations" (
  "translation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each translation */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the translation belongs to */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* Language code for the translation */,
  "translated_name" TEXT /* Translated name of the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the translation was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the translation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("translation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_translations_language_code FOREIGN KEY ("language_code") REFERENCES language_codes ("language_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_translations_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_translations" (
  "translation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each translation */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the translation belongs to */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* Language code for the translation */,
  "translated_name" TEXT /* Translated name of the country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the translation was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the translation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("translation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_translations_language_code FOREIGN KEY ("language_code") REFERENCES language_codes ("language_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_translations_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, business user) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country related to the activity */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region related to the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the activity */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activities_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activities_activity_type FOREIGN KEY ("activity_type") REFERENCES activity_types ("activity_type"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activities_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activities_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_region" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id", "region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "language_codes" (
  "language_code" TEXT /* Language code (e.g., en, fr) */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the language code was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the language code's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_types" (
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity type was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity type's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role" TEXT /* Role assigned to a user (e.g., admin, analyst, business user) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role")
)
